content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are tightly matched to live reads and sequenced according to the AoA coaching path. Turn 2 immediately collapses abstract complaint into the present moment ('just like right now'), making the anxiety available as data rather than story. Turn 4 names what's happening ('you're being seen') and asks how it's working — using the live laboratory. Turn 6 refuses to chase the puzzle and points out the answer is already present. Turn 10 pivots from anxiety to shame at the exact moment the client names self-beating, asking the head-on question rather than reassuring. Turn 12's 'isn't that weird?' is permission-giving humor at the right beat. Turn 14/16 reads a somatic movement and asks the client to stay with it rather than complete a verbal answer — feeling before story. Turn 18 names the grief rather than asking. Turn 22 deploys 'any problem being seen right now?' at the precise moment the shift has happened. Turn 28 closes cleanly without extracting commitment. Moves are earned, paced, and the coach holds silence after each (no rushing).",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 22, 28],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brings the abstract complaint into the live moment — present-moment lab move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the live phenomenon ('being seen') and asks how it's working — move matched to read."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to chase puzzle; collapses to 'so what's the question?' — earns the next step."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the client's own statement back to surface the missing piece rather than supplying it."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pivots from anxiety to shame at the right moment; asks 'what's wrong with you' head-on instead of reassuring."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Permission-giving humor names the absurdity — lets defense drop."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads somatic 'going down' and invites client to stay with it — feeling before story."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Clarifies the read without breaking the descent; explicitly says 'don't need to find an answer, just keep going there.'"},
    {"turn": 18, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the grief rather than asking — read-led move."},
    {"turn": 20, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes feared revelation as the gift; perfectly timed."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Deploys 'how is that not here right now' at the exact post-shift moment."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds space for the client to finish their own discovery rather than supplying it."},
    {"turn": 28, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Clean close — doesn't belabor insight or extract commitment."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "press-the-button-thought-experiment", "how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now", "shame-as-disconnection"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Close on turn 28 is part of the methodology, not abruptness."
}
